headline: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on KKR, Lowers Price Target to $139
summary: Oppenheimer  analyst Chris Kotowski   maintains KKR (NYSE:KKR) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $143 to $139.

headline: KKR & Co. 'D' Mandatory Convertible Preferred: Remains A Buy
summary: KKR.PR.D is a Buy for KKR rebound seekers: 7.6% yield, downside protection, and March 2028 conversion value vs. common. Click for more on KKR.
